name: Dream World Adventure
short_description: This is a cute and casual Roguelike game. Experience a thrilling journey in the dream world! Those seemingly cute little monsters are actually murderous. Use different weapon props to eliminate groups of enemies and survive.
detailed_description:
《Dream World Adventure》 is a cute and casual Roguelike game. In the dream world, you need to face various cute but aggressive monsters. Choose different weapon props combinations to eliminate groups of enemies.
Choose your character, survive as long as possible in this dangerous dream world, and then fight your way out!

Game Features

Weapons are preset to automatic shooting!
Fast pace (no more than 20 minutes per game)!
Different characters have different initial weapons and attributes
Multiple skill props combinations for you to choose!
Pick up experience to upgrade, and select weapons and props on the upgrade page!
Multiple difficulty options: high-difficulty enemies have higher health and damage, challenge different difficulties~
